scenario.title: Reschedule an existing appointment
scenario.goal: Reschedule an existing appointment to next week, preferably a weekday morning.
must_try: Say you already have an appointment but need to move it.
Ask for weekday morning options next week.
scenario.success_condition: The agent understands the change request and discusses alternative appointment times.
good_bug_signals: The agent ignores that there is already an appointment.
The agent restarts the booking flow incorrectly.
The agent gives contradictory rescheduling instructions.

retell_llm_dynamic_variables.success_condition: The agent understands the change request and discusses alternative appointment times.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.goal: Reschedule an existing appointment to next week, preferably a weekday morning.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.must_try: Say you already have an appointment but need to move it. | Ask for weekday morning options next week.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.title: Reschedule an existing appointment
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.known_facts: has_existing_appointment=yes; current_appointment_time=this Friday at 2:00 PM; preferred_day_window=next week; preferred_time=weekday morning

call_data.transcript:
User: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. 
User: Thanks 
Agent: That's 
User: for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics. Part of Pretty Good AI, Am I speaking with Maria? 
Agent: Yes, this is Maria Lopez. I actually already have an appointment scheduled for this Friday at 2:00 PM, but I need to move it. Could you help me reschedule to a weekday morning next week instead?
User: For verification, may I have your date of birth? 
Agent: Sure, my date of birth is March 12, 1985.
User: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it. 
Agent: Thank you. Can you 
User: Thanks, 
Agent: let me 
User: Maria. Let me check your upcoming appointment and find available weekday morning slots for next week. One moment. Maria, I see you have two upcoming appointments for a new patient consultation with doctor Bricker one on Thursday, March nineteenth at ten thirty AM, and another on Friday, March twentieth at nine forty five AM. Just to confirm, are you looking to reschedule the Friday appointment at nine forty five AM to a weekday morning next week? 
Agent: Actually, I wanted to reschedule my Friday appointment, but the one I have is at 2:00 PM, not 9:45 AM. Could you double-check if there’s an appointment for me this Friday afternoon? I’d like to move that one to a weekday morning next week.
User: I don't see a Friday afternoon appointment. In your records. Only one at nine forty five AM this Friday. Would you like to reschedule the nine forty five AM appointment to a weekday morning week instead? 
Agent: Oh, I see. Yes, please—let’s reschedule the 9:45 AM appointment this Friday to a weekday morning next week. What options do you have available?
User: Let me check for available weekday morning slots next week to reschedule your new patient consultation. One moment. 
User: I'm having trouble accessing the available slots right now. I'll document this issue and let our clinic support team know so they can follow-up with you directly. Please stay on the line while I update your request. 
Agent: No problem, 
User: Since I'm unable to access the available slots and live support is open, I'll connect you to our clinic support team so they can help you reschedule your appointment. Please stay on the line while I transfer your call. Connecting you to a representative. 
User: Please 
Agent: Thank you for your help. I'll stay on the 
User: Hello. You've reached 
Agent: line for the transfer.
Agent: Hello, I’m still here. It sounds like the transfer didn’t go through—should I wait, or is there another way I can get help rescheduling my appointment?

transcript_with_tool_calls.name: transfer_call
transcript_with_tool_calls.arguments: {"execution_message":"Thank you for your help. I'll stay on the line for the transfer."}

transcript_with_tool_calls.content: {"status":"Transfer call cannot be completed, the other side declined the transfer.. Please inform the customer that the transfer did not go through and offer to try again or assist them directly."}
Hello, I’m still here. It sounds like the transfer didn’t go through—should I wait, or is there another way I can get help rescheduling my appointment?

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent called Maria Lopez to reschedule her Friday appointment to a weekday morning next week. There was confusion about the appointment time, and the agent was unable to access available slots to reschedule. The agent attempted to transfer the call to clinic support, but the transfer failed, and the call ended with the agent offering further assistance.
